risk_description: DKT model training data insufficient for accurate predictions
mitigation_strategy: Collect 6+ months of interaction data before launch; start with BKT-only fallback
contingency_plan: Deploy rule-based heuristic system with manual teacher override

risk_description: COPPA/FERPA audit findings delay pilot launch
mitigation_strategy: Engage third-party compliance auditor 3 months pre-pilot; implement privacy-by-design
contingency_plan: Delay pilot to non-COPPA grades (6-12) while resolving K-5 issues

risk_description: Neo4j learning graph performance degradation at scale (>100K students)
mitigation_strategy: Implement read replicas and caching layer; load test at 2x projected scale
contingency_plan: Fallback to materialized path queries with denormalized prerequisite tables

risk_description: Teacher resistance to AI-driven recommendations undermines efficacy
mitigation_strategy: Mandatory human-in-the-loop design; teacher override always available; PD program
contingency_plan: Pivot to teacher-assigned paths with AI suggestions rather than autonomous delivery

risk_description: Measured learning gains fail to reach statistical significance vs. control
mitigation_strategy: Power analysis for RCT; minimum 200 students per arm; 12-week intervention
contingency_plan: Extend pilot duration; adjust outcome measures; publish null results transparently

risk_description: Real-time inference latency exceeds 200ms SLA during peak load
mitigation_strategy: GPU auto-scaling; model quantization; edge caching of knowledge states
contingency_plan: Graceful degradation to cached recommendations with async model updates

risk_description: Student PII data breach or unauthorized access incident
mitigation_strategy: Field-level encryption; zero-trust architecture; SOC 2 Type II prep; penetration testing
contingency_plan: Activate incident response plan; breach notification within 72 hours; regulatory reporting

risk_description: LTI 1.3/LMS integration failures block deployment at target schools
mitigation_strategy: Early partnership with 2-3 LMS vendors; Clever rostering as fallback
contingency_plan: Manual CSV rostering with automated sync once integration resolved

risk_description: Insufficient standards-aligned content coverage for pilot grades
mitigation_strategy: Partner with established content providers; teacher authoring tools
contingency_plan: Reduce pilot scope to subjects with complete content coverage

risk_description: Key personnel departure (ML engineer, platform architect)
mitigation_strategy: Documentation requirements; pair programming; bus factor >1 for critical roles
contingency_plan: Engage contractor/consultant with domain expertise; prioritize knowledge transfer
